pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Operations & Program Management is an edge domain for the Director of Data Science, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.456) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Operations & Program Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.456). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Science versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: PMI, TOGAF operational frameworks, and CDO survey data (NewVantage Partners) confirm operational program management as a key competency for data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Operations & Program Management appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Science.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Operations & Program Management task KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.456. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Data Science.
